import { useState } from "react"; import "./App.css"; import "./Footer.css"; import Mail from "../src/images/mail.png"; import "./CvButton.scss"; import "./ContactSubmit.scss"; export default function Footer() { const [show, setShow] = useState("CvForm-Footer2None"); const [ide, setIde] = useState("cvButt"); const [contact, setContact] = useState("contactBackgroundNone"); const showCv = (e) => { if (show === "CvForm-Footer2None") { setShow("CvForm-Footer2"); setTimeout(() => setIde("ide"), 2000); } else { setShow("CvForm-Footer2None"); setIde("cvButt"); } }; const showContact = (e) => { if (contact === "contactBackgroundNone") { setContact("contactBackgroundFlex"); } else { setContact("contactBackgroundNone"); } }; return (
